titleStmt.title: SII 42.259: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 259. (A.R. No. 22 of 1956-57.) Uppuguṇḍūru, Ongole Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone set up in front of the Śiva temple.
Dated Śaka 1140, Kārttīka, punnami, Kṛittika, Sunday but datable to A.D. 1218, November 4.

Partly built in. Records the construction of the big tank in the village by Aitama-seṭṭi, the Prabhu-mukhya of Nellūru-sthala situated in Pāka-nāḍu 21,000 and the son of Miṇḍa-guddali Chaṁḍiseṭṭi. (cf. NDI, Part III, pp. 1129-31).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: Figures of moon, liṅga, Sun and Nāga.

svasti samasta praśasti sahi
taṁbaina śrīgaurīśvaradēvara
divya śrīpādārādhakulaina pākanāṁṭi I
ruvai OkkavēIṁ(yiṁ)ṭiki nellūri staḷamunaku pra
bhumukhyuṁḍaina śrīmatu miṁḍaguddali ca
ṁḍiseṭṭi koḍuku [Ī](Ai)tamaseṭṭi Iyu
ppuguṁḍūru pali Ūri peddaceṟvu
kaṭṭiṁci Ūricuṭṭunu varimaḍlaku
Accukaṭṭucēsi tammēlina gaṇapatidēva ma
hārājunaku tama tallitaṁḍṟlaku tanaku puṇya

mugānu śakava¨rṣaṁbulu
1140 Agunēṁṭi kā¨rttika śu
dha(ddha) punnamayuṁ grittikaya(yu)nādi
vāramunāṁḍu Uppugoṁḍūri
śrī gaurīśvara mahādēvaraku nellūri miṁḍagu
ddali Aitama seṭṭi tana ceṟvu Āṟu kākānīrunē
laku 200 velivolamu kha 3 I(Ī) dha¨rmmuve
varainānu tanaḍapipuṇyanaḍapēṁdi
dīni tri(ta)ppinavāru gaṁgakaṟuta kavila po
ḍicinavāru Arvadivēlēṁḍlu toṁkatru
malu toluvaṁgā naṟakānanuṁḍaṁgalavāru
Lines 8-10 are available in NDI, III, pp. 1130-31, while this portion is built in, according to the Govt. Epigraphist.
Digital edition of SII 42.259 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
